title: Vežba 94

fillInTheBlank.sentence: Compliance is when we put specific rules, policies, and regulations that are important to our industry into practice. It helps BLANK BLANK at the workplace.

blanks.feedback: Ova reč u množini govori o dobrom karakteru i poštenju.

dialogue.text: Compliance is when we put specific rules, policies, and regulations that are important to our industry into practice. It helps promote ethics at the workplace.

description:
James kaže, It helps promote ethics at the workplace. Timeći kažu, misli da pridržavanje pravila, politika i propisa pomaže i podstiče dobro ponašanje, iskrenost i pravednost među zaposlenima.

Implementiranjem ovih pravila, kompanija stvara radno okruženje u kojem ljudi čine prave stvari i poštuju svoje kolege sa pravednošću.
